Package com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

Class TableViews

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.TableViews
public final class TableViews extends Object
Utility class providing methods for manipulating TableView instances.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> void
    clear(javafx.scene.control.TableView<T> tv)
    Clear TableView.
    static <S> javafx.scene.control.TableView<S>

    Creates a new TableView instance configured with the specified columns, initial items, and optional row-draggability behavior.

  • Method Details

    • clear

      public static <T> void clear(javafx.scene.control.TableView<T> tv)
      Clear TableView.

      Clears both items and columns of the TableView instance.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the TableView type parameter
      Parameters:
      tv - the TableView

    • newTableView

      public static <S> javafx.scene.control.TableView<S> newTableView(SequencedCollection<ColumnDef<S,?>> columns, TableViewOptions options)
      Creates a new TableView instance configured with the specified columns.
      Type Parameters:
      S - The type of the items to be displayed in the TableView.
      Parameters:
      columns - A SequencedCollection of ColumnDefText that defines the columns of the TableView. Each ColumnDefText includes information such as the column header, value provider, and cell converter.
      options - A TableViewOptions instance specifying configuration options.
      Returns:
      A configured TableView instance containing the defined columns.

    • newTableView

      public static <S> javafx.scene.control.TableView<S> newTableView(SequencedCollection<? extends ColumnDef<S,?>> columns, TableViewOptions options, SequencedCollection<? extends S> initialItems)
      Creates a new TableView instance configured with the specified columns, initial items, and optional row-draggability behavior.
      Type Parameters:
      S - The type of the items to be displayed in the TableView.
      Parameters:
      columns - A SequencedCollection of ColumnDef defining the table columns. Each ColumnDef contains information such as header, value provider, cell properties, and customization options.
      options - A TableViewOptions instance specifying configuration options.
      initialItems - A SequencedCollection containing the initial items to be displayed in the TableView.
      Returns:
      A configured TableView instance containing the specified columns, initial items, and row-draggability behavior (if enabled).
